_comment: Stryker mutates ONLY the money/security/resilience-critical files. Mutating everything would take hours; this scope completes in <8min on CI. Add entries when a new critical lib lands — AND add a fast test file that kills its mutants to the command below, or the score silently dilutes. THRESHOLD RATCHET (2026-06-11): break was an aspirational 60% that never passed after the mutate list grew past the command's test files (real score: 25.75% before plan-limits + cost-guard were wired in below). break now sits just under the measured score and must only move UP: write killing tests for the 0%-score files (planGate, businessMemory, webhookEvents), then raise break to match. Keep command tests fast — each runs once per mutant.

commandRunner.command: node --test tests/oauth-crypto.test.js tests/budget-counter.test.js tests/abuse-detector.test.js tests/stripe-webhook.test.js tests/circuit-breaker.test.js tests/retry-with-jitter.test.js tests/external-http.test.js tests/idempotency.test.js tests/event-schemas.test.js tests/plan-limits.test.js tests/cost-guard.test.js
